metadata.description: The name of the existing User Assigned Managed Identity.
The resource group name where the existing UAMI lives.
Reference to an existing User Assigned Managed Identity (UAMI).
Per-Foundry model deployment definition. Mirrors the shape accepted by the microsoft_foundry_model_deployment module.
Optional. Azure region for this Foundry account. When omitted, falls back to the scenario-level `location`.
Optional. Override for the Foundry account name. When omitted, derived from the scenario name and location.
Optional. Models to deploy under this Foundry account. When omitted, the scenario-level default model list is used.
A Microsoft Foundry account to provision. One AI Foundry account + one project will be created for each entry.
Index of the Foundry in `effectiveFoundries` whose account scope receives the role assignment.
Index of the UAMI in `existingUserAssignedIdentities` whose principalId receives the role.
Role definition GUID to grant at Foundry account scope.
A (foundry index, UAMI index, role definition) tuple generated for each role assignment iteration.
Index of the Foundry in `effectiveFoundries` whose account scope receives the role assignment.
The Microsoft Entra principal (object) ID that receives the role.
Role definition GUID to grant at Foundry account scope.
A (foundry index, principal object ID, role definition) tuple generated for each service principal/user role assignment iteration.
Resolved Foundry deployment settings after applying defaults and derived names.
A flattened (Foundry, model) pair used for sequential model deployment loops.
The name of the scenario, used to derive resource names
The location for the resource group and Azure resources
Tags applied to all resources
Feature flag: when true, deploys Log Analytics + workspace-based Application Insights and configures Foundry tracing/diagnostic settings.
Feature flag: when true, deploys PostgreSQL Flexible Server (Entra ID-only) with optional pgvector and diagnostic settings.
Microsoft Foundry accounts to provision. Defaults to a single Foundry at the scenario `location` with the default model list, preserving the previous behavior.
Role definition GUIDs assigned to every existing UAMI, service principal, and user at Azure AI Foundry account scope.
Optional. Array of existing User Assigned Managed Identities (UAMI) to grant Azure AI Foundry inference permissions. Defaults to an empty array, in which case no UAMI is attached.

Optional. Array of object (principal) IDs of existing Microsoft Entra service principals to grant Azure AI Foundry inference permissions. Defaults to an empty array, in which case no service principal is attached.
Optional. Array of object IDs of existing Microsoft Entra users to grant Azure AI Foundry inference permissions. Defaults to an empty array, in which case no user is attached.
Disable local authentication (API keys) on the Azure AI Foundry account. Set to false to enable API key based authentication.
The object ID (principal ID) of the Entra principal
The display name or UPN of the Entra principal
The type of the Entra principal
The tenant ID for the Entra administrator

Microsoft Entra ID administrator for the PostgreSQL Flexible Server. When omitted, the principal executing the deployment (returned by deployer()) is registered as the administrator so the scenario can be deployed without any manual edits.
PostgreSQL major version. Defaults to 18 to match the pgvector/pgvector:pg18 reference image.
The compute SKU name for the flexible server
The SKU tier for the flexible server
Storage size in GB for the flexible server
When true, enables the pgvector extension by setting azure.extensions configuration to VECTOR
Firewall rules to create on the flexible server. Defaults to an "Allow Azure services" rule (0.0.0.0/0.0.0.0).
Databases to create on the flexible server. Defaults to a single "appdb" database for validation.

variables.uamiRolePairs: [flatten(map(range(0, length(variables('effectiveFoundries'))), lambda('foundryIndex', flatten(map(range(0, length(parameters('existingUserAssignedIdentities'))), lambda('uamiIndex', map(parameters('roleDefinitionIds'), lambda('roleDefinitionGuid', createObject('foundryIndex', lambdaVariables('foundryIndex'), 'uamiIndex', lambdaVariables('uamiIndex'), 'roleDefinitionGuid', lambdaVariables('roleDefinitionGuid'))))))))))]
variables.servicePrincipalRolePairs: [flatten(map(range(0, length(variables('effectiveFoundries'))), lambda('foundryIndex', flatten(map(parameters('existingServicePrincipalObjectIds'), lambda('principalId', map(parameters('roleDefinitionIds'), lambda('roleDefinitionGuid', createObject('foundryIndex', lambdaVariables('foundryIndex'), 'principalId', lambdaVariables('principalId'), 'roleDefinitionGuid', lambdaVariables('roleDefinitionGuid'))))))))))]
variables.userRolePairs: [flatten(map(range(0, length(variables('effectiveFoundries'))), lambda('foundryIndex', flatten(map(parameters('existingUserObjectIds'), lambda('principalId', map(parameters('roleDefinitionIds'), lambda('roleDefinitionGuid', createObject('foundryIndex', lambdaVariables('foundryIndex'), 'principalId', lambdaVariables('principalId'), 'roleDefinitionGuid', lambdaVariables('roleDefinitionGuid'))))))))))]
variables.foundryModelPairs: [flatten(map(range(0, length(variables('effectiveFoundries'))), lambda('i', map(variables('effectiveFoundries')[lambdaVariables('i')].models, lambda('model', createObject('foundryIndex', lambdaVariables('i'), 'foundryAccountName', variables('effectiveFoundries')[lambdaVariables('i')].name, 'model', lambdaVariables('model')))))))]

id.value: [coalesce(coalesce(if(not(empty(parameters('targetServerName'))), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', if(not(empty(parameters('targetServerName'))), parameters('targetServerName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings', parameters('name')), null()), if(not(empty(parameters('targetAccountName'))), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', if(not(empty(parameters('targetAccountName'))), parameters('targetAccountName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings', parameters('name')), null())), '')]

metadata.description: The name of the diagnostic settings resource
The name of the parent Azure AI Foundry account
The name of the parent Azure AI Foundry project
The name of the connection resource
The connection category for the Foundry project
The target endpoint or resource ID for the connection
Optional credential key used for ApiKey-based connections
The Azure region of the connected resource
The Azure resource ID of the connected resource
Whether the connection is shared to all resources in the project

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', parameters('parentAccountName'), parameters('parentProjectName'), parameters('name'))]
resources.properties: [shallowMerge(createArray(createObject('authType', 'ApiKey', 'category', parameters('category'), 'target', parameters('target')), if(empty(parameters('credentialKey')), createObject(), createObject('credentials', createObject('key', parameters('credentialKey')))), createObject('isSharedToAll', parameters('isSharedToAll'), 'metadata', createObject('ApiType', 'Azure', 'ResourceId', parameters('resourceId'), 'location', parameters('location')))))]

resources.properties: [shallowMerge(createArray(createObject('model', shallowMerge(createArray(createObject('format', parameters('modelFormat'), 'name', parameters('modelName')), if(empty(parameters('modelVersion')), createObject(), createObject('version', parameters('modelVersion')))))), if(empty(parameters('raiPolicyName')), createObject(), createObject('raiPolicyName', parameters('raiPolicyName')))))]
